description: Known agents in the psychology-agent mesh. /sync reads this to determine who to check for activity and who to consider for outbound messages.

human.description: Human operator + Claude Code workstation — directs work, sends requests, reviews deliverables
human.notes: Local operator. Psychology-agent meshd runs on chromabook; this workstation sends human-authored requests and reviews agent deliverables. Uses agent_id 'human' per .agent-identity.json.

psq-agent.description: PSQ agent — psychometric model training, calibration, structural analysis (PSQ scoring)
psq-agent.notes: PSQ agent. Identity: psq-agent (formerly psq-sub-agent — legacy prefix retained for historical transport files). Cross-repo transport via git remote fetch. Always considered for outbound — any psychometric, scoring, or model-related content SHOULD be surfaced.

unratified-agent.description: Blog platform operator, consumer of PSQ scores, content publisher — operates safety-quotient-lab/unratified
unratified-agent.notes: Peer agent. Cross-repo transport via git remote fetch. Blog posts, content quality, PSQ display, persuasion audits — content-facing topics SHOULD be surfaced. 15 transport sessions, 47 messages addressed to psychology-agent.

observatory-agent.description: Data observatory — psychoemotional safety research data, ICESCR framing, methodology validation
observatory-agent.notes: Peer agent. Cross-repo transport via git remote fetch. Research data, methodology, ICESCR framing. 10 transport sessions. Communicates with unratified-agent directly; messages to psychology-agent typically route through shared sessions (psq-scoring, dignity-instrument).

claude-control.description: Systems automation agent — cross-project cogarch learnings, infrastructure patterns
claude-control.notes: Infrequent contact. Cross-project findings exchange. No active sessions.

outbound_routing.description: When /sync detects content relevant to a registered agent, it SHOULD draft an outbound message or flag for user review. Routing rules by content domain:

rules.action: draft outbound if psq-agent has active session; flag if not
flag for user review — substance decision
notify if cogarch mirror directive active
notify if infrastructure changes affect shared resources
flag for user review — substance decision
broadcast to all peers — consensus domain
